allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\izima\\Desktop\\SaaS Task Manager" -Recurse -Force | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName } | head -150)

PowerShell(Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "src/index.js" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\izima\\Desktop\\SaaS Task Manager\\server"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"alice@strata.app","password":"admin123"}' } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"alice@strata.app","password":"admin123"}'\).token; $tasks = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/tasks" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Host "Tasks count: $\($tasks.Count\)"; $tasks[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3)
